core_mechanism: evolutionary (genetic-algorithm) population-based search over a space of candidate analytic functions — symbolic regression — in which each generated functional form is first passed through hard feasibility/constraint filters and surviving candidates are then scored and selected by goodness-of-fit to observational data
brief_reason: The abstract adopts a Genetic Algorithm to reconstruct analytical functional forms, filtering each generated function through viability constraints and then selecting candidates by their fit to BAO and supernova data, which is a constraint-filtered evolutionary symbolic-regression search.
